case_title: ON DECK CAPITAL, INC. VS. CAFE ENCORE COFFEE HOUSE, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100078151) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON DECK CAPITAL, INC. APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON DECK CAPITAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAFE ENCORE COFFEE HOUSE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ON DECK CAPITAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAFE ENCORE COFFEE HOUSE, INC. $44,656.52 PRINCIPAL, $1,670.76 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $46,777.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

ORDER OF EXAMINATION NOV-13-2019 - DISCHARGED WITHOUT COSTS PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT LOCAL RULE 8.9E AS TO ALLA EDDINE BEDDAR, AS PRESIDENT OF DEFENDANT CAFE ENCORE COFFEE HOUSE, INC. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO APPEARANCES. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
